title: Iteration 2.1: Stage probability + weighted column total
description: Add probability field to DealStage type with default values (Opportunity 0.10, Proposal Sent 0.50, In Negotiation 0.75, Won 1.0, Lost 0.0, Delayed 0.25). Factor weighted-total math into pure computeWeightedTotal helper in dealUtils.ts with Vitest tests (typical, 0% Lost edge, 100% Won edge, empty, single). Update DealColumn.tsx header to show weighted total as primary figure with raw sum on hover. Pure frontend, no schema. See .devmeta/increments/increment-2-wpr/_overview.md for full details.
closed_reason: Iteration 2.1 complete: feature 2.1.A delivered, PR #1 merged, metadata committed. Unblocks I&A cycle 2.1R.
